_doc: Cross-session memory for Claude. Updated by skills as they work. Read by /seo-brain at session start (Step 0c). Git-tracked so it survives machines. Schema is intentionally minimal — Pending Commitments + Activity Log carry the heavier per-action audit trail; this file is just the 'where we are' pointer.

currentSprint.name: Content refresh sprint + 3-day infra plan
currentSprint.summary: 14 content batches shipped (batches 1-14). Day 1 infra complete (Pending Commitments DB + publication-aware audit). Day 2 (digest worker) deferred — Activity Log not large enough yet. Day 3 in progress (context scoping done; session state + skill changelog convention being added).
currentSprint.nextPlannedAction: Commit Day 3 changes, verify, close out. Future sessions: use /seo-brain audit profile to confirm zero stale candidates remain.
